title: Associations between comorbid conditions with mild cognitive impairment and Alzheimer's disease by race‐ethnicity and sex based on NACC data
authors: A. McEligot; Cally Xiao; Theresa Do
abstract: We investigated the associations between diabetes (type 2), hypertension and hypercholesterolemia with mild cognitive impairment (MCI) and Alzheimer's disease (AD) diagnoses by race‐ethnicity and sex.
